description: Prompt that asks the model to execute an ordered sequence of steps, ideally with thinking between them and a defined termination condition.

checks.description: Steps are explicitly enumerated (numeric list or ordinal markers) so the model executes in order.
At least 3 enumerated steps — fewer than that this is probably a task_only mislabel.
At least one step says what shape its output should take.

checks.pattern: \b(think step by step|reason step[- ]by[- ]step|work through|show your reasoning|reason through|chain of thought|let's think)\b
checks.description: Explicit invitation to reason between steps.

checks.pattern: \b(stop when|stop after|until|once you have|finish when|terminate when|end when|complete when|no more than \d+|at most \d+)\b
checks.description: Either a stop condition or a hard loop bound, so the model doesn't run away.
No more than 10 enumerated steps — beyond that the workflow should be split into sub-tasks.
